---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Data science & analytics, in Python and R."
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
